title: Entrance
text: The Entrance is the starting area of the dungeons. It is a crumbling stone structure with ancient architecture. The player begins here at the start of the game. The area contains basic items including torches, a Tinderbox or Lighter, and healing herbs. Early enemies include Guards and Maneba. The entrance connects to the basement and inner hall areas.

title: Basement
text: The Basement is directly below the entrance area. It is darker than the entrance and contains more dangerous enemies. Key items found here may include additional torches, food, and early-game equipment. The basement serves as a transition zone between the relatively safer entrance and the more dangerous prison and inner hall areas.

title: Prisons
text: The Prisons are a major area of the early dungeon. This area contains prison cells, torture rooms, and hostile guards. Key NPCs found here include Buckman (a helpful prisoner) and Trortur (a hostile torturer). The area is patrolled by Guards and Elite Guards. A ritual circle can be found in one of the safer rooms. The Girl can be found in a cage here.

title: Library
text: The Library is an area filled with ancient books and scrolls. It contains valuable lore items, books that can boost knowledge or Mind, and scrolls with alchemical recipes. The area may be guarded by unique enemies. Reading certain books can reveal dungeon secrets, alchemy formulas, or lore about the world's history.

title: Courtyard
text: The Courtyard is an open area within the dungeon complex. It features statues, a well, and connects to multiple other areas. The Courtyard is a crossroads point that links the entrance area to deeper dungeon sections. Enemies here may include Guard Ballistas and Cave Gnomes. Notable NPCs may pass through or reside in this area.

title: Mines
text: The Mines are a dark underground area filled with Cave Gnomes, mining equipment, and dangerous pits. Torches are essential here due to extreme darkness. The mines contain valuable ore and crafting materials. They connect to deeper dungeon sections and may contain hidden passages. Falling into pits can lead to secret areas or instant death.

title: Inner Hall
text: The Inner Hall is a central dungeon area that branches into multiple directions. It is patrolled by Guards and Elite Guards. The area features grand hallways, murals, and connects the entrance to the library, prisons, and deeper dungeon floors. Key items and early lore discoveries can be made here.

title: Blood Pit
text: The Blood Pit is a gruesome area deep in the dungeons filled with blood and corpses. It is inhabited by dangerous creatures including Maneba and possibly stronger variants. The Blood Pit connects the inner hall to deeper sections and may contain unique items or lore related to the dungeon's dark history. The area's atmosphere is particularly oppressive.
